notes: Dummy-engine runs are smoke tests only and are not included as public benchmark results.
Populate this file from generated metrics.json artifacts after running the real simulator suites below.

commands: nyssa run --suite maniskill_smoke_v0 --engine maniskill --policy random --episodes 100 --seed 42 --out runs/maniskill_random_v0
nyssa run --suite maniskill_smoke_v0 --engine maniskill --policy robomimic --episodes 100 --seed 42 --out runs/maniskill_robomimic_v0
nyssa run --suite maniskill_smoke_v0 --engine maniskill --policy diffusion --episodes 100 --seed 42 --out runs/maniskill_diffusion_v0
nyssa run --suite mujoco_control_v0 --engine mujoco --policy random --episodes 100 --seed 42 --out runs/mujoco_random_v0
nyssa run --suite mujoco_control_v0 --engine mujoco --policy scripted --episodes 100 --seed 42 --out runs/mujoco_scripted_v0
